spec.description: Prometheus scrape health for the Musubi API.
spec.title: API target

spec.description: Server errors grouped by route, method, and response status. An empty panel means no 5xx series in the selected range.
spec.title: 5xx errors by route

spec.description: Resident memory and Node.js heap usage.
spec.title: Process memory

spec.description: CPU seconds consumed per wall-clock second. A value of 1 equals one fully utilized CPU core.
spec.title: CPU usage

spec.description: Percentage of completed requests returning HTTP 5xx.
spec.title: 5xx error rate

spec.description: Requests currently being processed by the API.
spec.title: Requests in flight

spec.description: Resident memory used by the API process.
spec.title: Resident memory

spec.description: Request throughput grouped by HTTP response status.
spec.title: Requests by status

spec.description: API response-duration percentiles calculated from the request histogram.
spec.title: Latency percentiles

spec.description: Request throughput grouped by bounded Express route pattern and HTTP method.
spec.title: Requests by route
